languages.text: {n}На Дунавски больно смотреть — взгляд ее стал рассеян, а сама она выглядит потерянной.{/n}
{n}It is painful to look at Dunawski — she looks lost, staring at nothing with an unfocused gaze.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}На Дунавски больно смотреть — взгляд ее стал рассеян, а сама она выглядит потерянной.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}It is painful to look at Dunawski — she looks lost, staring at nothing with an unfocused gaze.{/n}
{n}It is painful to look at Dunawski — she looks lost, staring at nothing with an unfocused gaze.{/n}
{n}It is painful to look at Dunawski — she looks lost, staring at nothing with an unfocused gaze.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ダナウスキを見るのはつらい。彼女は途方に暮れ、焦点の合わない目で虚空を見つめている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is painful to look at Dunawski — she looks lost, staring at nothing with an unfocused gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ダナウスキを見るのはつらい。彼女は途方に暮れ、焦点の合わない目で虚空を見つめている。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La réaction de Dunawski fait peine à voir : elle semble perdue et son regard vitreux se perd dans le vide.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is painful to look at Dunawski — she looks lost, staring at nothing with an unfocused gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La réaction de Dunawski fait peine à voir : elle semble perdue et son regard vitreux se perd dans le vide.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dunawski'ye bakmak sana acı veriyor... Kaybolmuş görünüyor, odağından kopmuş şekilde boşluğa bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is painful to look at Dunawski — she looks lost, staring at nothing with an unfocused gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski'ye bakmak sana acı veriyor... Kaybolmuş görünüyor, odağından kopmuş şekilde boşluğa bakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Es schmerzt, Dunawski anzusehen ... sie wirkt verloren und starrt mit teilnahmslosem Blick ins Leere.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is painful to look at Dunawski — she looks lost, staring at nothing with an unfocused gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Es schmerzt, Dunawski anzusehen ... sie wirkt verloren und starrt mit teilnahmslosem Blick ins Leere.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Duele ver a Dunawski: parece perdida y mira a la nada.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is painful to look at Dunawski — she looks lost, staring at nothing with an unfocused gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Duele ver a Dunawski: parece perdida y mira a la nada.{/n}

languages.text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡的样子令人心痛——她神情恍惚，目光涣散地凝视着虚空。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is painful to look at Dunawski — she looks lost, staring at nothing with an unfocused gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡的样子令人心痛——她神情恍惚，目光涣散地凝视着虚空。{/n}
